post.summary: Get Employee(s), Add Employee, Update Employee, Delete Employee
post.description: The employee service uses a single /employee resource with a POST method to search, add, update and delete employees. The client sends in an enterpriseDocument payload for the request and an enterpriseDocument payload is returned in the response.
